PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Mar-19-2012 is admitted to probate. Erin L. Markey is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $3,400,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-24-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. William Barry. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
